blocks.description: Full-width or contained hero section with heading, optional subtitle, background image, CTAs

variations.name: hero (page-heading with breadcrumb)
variations.contentModel: H1 + optional subtitle + optional CTA buttons + breadcrumb above

variations.name: hero (full-width modern)
variations.domSignature: Full-width div with H1 + tagline + CTA buttons + anchor nav links
variations.contentModel: H1 + paragraph tagline + CTA buttons + optional anchor navigation links

variations.name: hero (product with dual CTAs)
variations.domSignature: H1 + two CTA buttons + hero product image
variations.contentModel: H1 + 'Request info' button + 'Experience products' button + product image

variations.name: hero (mondrian multi-slot)
variations.contentModel: Left large panel (feature promo) + right stacked panels (2 smaller offers)

variations.name: hero (classic banner)
variations.contentModel: H1 + subtitle text

variations.name: hero (corporate)
variations.contentModel: Variable - hero text, about hero, or banner depending on page type

blocks.consolidationReason: 6 distinct content models with divergent layouts. Recommend: hero (standard) combining V1+V2+V3, hero-mondrian for V4, hero-corporate for V5+V6. Total: 3 EDS blocks.

blocks.description: Grid of content cards with various layouts (image+text, text-only, icon+text)

variations.name: cards (image + title + description + CTA)
variations.domSignature: Grid of divs each containing: linked img + H2/H3 + paragraph + CTA link with arrow
variations.contentModel: Image + H2/H3 heading (linked) + paragraph + 'Learn more' CTA

variations.name: cards (text-only links)
variations.domSignature: Grid of divs each containing: H3 (linked) + paragraph description
variations.contentModel: H3 heading (linked) + paragraph description, no image

variations.name: cards (product showcase 3-up)
variations.domSignature: Grid of divs each containing: linked product image + H3 title below
variations.contentModel: Product image (linked) + H3 product name below

variations.name: cards (featured resource overlay dark)
variations.contentModel: Background image + text overlay (H2 + description) + CTA on dark background

variations.name: cards (category 4-up legacy)
variations.contentModel: Heading + text paragraph per column, 4 columns

variations.name: cards (featured-grid asymmetric)
variations.domSignature: 1 large card (left) + 3 small cards (right) in magazine layout
variations.contentModel: Large feature card (H2 + CTA) alongside 3 smaller cards

variations.name: cards (icon value props 3-up)
variations.domSignature: 3-up grid of H3 + paragraph (no images, no CTAs)
variations.contentModel: H3 heading + paragraph description, no image, no CTA

variations.name: cards (CSR pillar cards)
variations.contentModel: 6 pillar cards with image + hover overlay text

blocks.consolidationReason: All share 'grid of items' pattern. Recommend single 'cards' EDS block with variants: default (V1), text-only (V2), product (V3), overlay (V4), category (V5). V6 (asymmetric) should be separate 'featured-grid' block. V7 maps to default content. V8 is corporate-specific.

blocks.description: Side-by-side text + image (50/50) layout block

variations.name: columns (text-left image-right with CTA)
variations.domSignature: Text block (H2 + paragraphs + CTA) alongside linked image
variations.contentModel: H2 + paragraph + CTA link (arrow icon) | Image

variations.name: columns (product image-right)
variations.domSignature: Text block (H2 + paragraphs + CTA) | Product photo
variations.contentModel: H2 + paragraph + CTA | Product photograph

variations.name: columns (legacy 2-col parsys)
variations.contentModel: 2 equal columns containing text, images, or nested components

variations.name: columns (featured product)
variations.contentModel: Featured product with larger image treatment

blocks.consolidationReason: All are 2-column side-by-side layouts. Single 'columns' block with image-position variant (left/right). Legacy 2-col parsys maps directly.

blocks.description: Promotional banner/teaser with dynamic content

variations.name: teaser (header promo bar)
variations.contentModel: Thin banner with promotional text + CTA link

variations.name: teaser (image-right)
variations.contentModel: Text on left + image on right + CTA

variations.name: teaser (image-background)
variations.contentModel: Text overlaid on background image + CTA

variations.name: teaser (mid-page promotional)
variations.domSignature: Full-width div with H2 + text + CTA + optional image
variations.contentModel: H2 + paragraph + CTA button, optional background

blocks.consolidationReason: All are promotional content with image + text + CTA. Single 'teaser' block with variants: header-bar, image-right, image-background, promotional.

blocks.description: Left sidebar navigation with categorized link lists

variations.name: sidebar-nav (auto-navigation)
variations.contentModel: Auto-generated category tree with expandable groups

variations.name: sidebar-nav (manual left-nav)
variations.contentModel: Manually authored link lists organized into labeled sections

blocks.consolidationReason: Both are sidebar navigation patterns. Map to single nav/sidebar approach in EDS or handle via page template.

blocks.description: Filterable event listing with search and checkbox filters

variations.name: event-table (filterable list)
variations.contentModel: Filter bar (checkboxes + text search) + event rows (H2 title + H4 date/location + description + thumbnail + Learn more link)

blocks.consolidationReason: Unique complex component with filtering behavior. Requires custom JS implementation in EDS.

blocks.description: Video embed block (Brightcove player)

variations.name: video (brightcove player)
variations.contentModel: Brightcove account ID + video ID + player configuration

variations.name: video (teaser with description)
variations.domSignature: .cmp-video-teaser containing video thumbnail + duration + heading + description
variations.contentModel: Video thumbnail + duration badge + H3 title + paragraph description

blocks.consolidationReason: Both are video-related. Single 'embed' or 'video' EDS block that accepts Brightcove embed URL.

blocks.description: Standardized 4-column resources footer (Blog, Events, Resources, Contact)

variations.name: resources-grid (bioprocessing standard)
variations.domSignature: 4-column container: each with icon image + H3 + paragraph + CTA link
variations.contentModel: 4 items: Image icon + H3 heading + paragraph + CTA link

blocks.consolidationReason: Highly consistent reusable fragment across bioprocessing pages. Map to shared EDS fragment or block.

blocks.description: Two-column list of linked resource titles with descriptions

variations.name: resources-list (title + description pairs)
variations.domSignature: Container with H3 (linked) + paragraph description pairs in 2-column layout
variations.contentModel: H3 linked title + paragraph description, arranged in 2 columns

blocks.consolidationReason: Simple linked-list pattern. Could be default content or simple block.

blocks.description: Sticky product sub-navigation with nested hierarchy

variations.name: product-sub-nav (sticky with CTA)
variations.domSignature: nav > ul with product categories + 'Speak to a specialist' CTA
variations.contentModel: Navigation tree (Overview, Product A, Product B...) + 'Contact' CTA

blocks.consolidationReason: Unique navigation pattern for product detail pages. Custom JS required.

blocks.description: Resource download cards with type label

variations.name: download-card (typed resource)
variations.domSignature: Card with bold type label (Application note: / Brochure: / Whitepaper:) + description + download CTA
variations.contentModel: Type label + title + description + download link

blocks.consolidationReason: Could be a variant of 'cards' block with download styling.

blocks.description: Styled container/box for grouped content (resources, links)

variations.name: well (default white)
variations.contentModel: Contained box with rich text, links, or nested components

variations.name: well (mini)
variations.contentModel: Compact box variant

blocks.consolidationReason: EDS handles styled containers via section-metadata block. Map well variants to section styles (background-color, padding).

blocks.description: Section heading divider with styled H2

variations.name: section-title (modern)
variations.contentModel: H2 section heading text

blocks.consolidationReason: Maps to default EDS content (H2 heading). No block needed.

blocks.description: In-page anchor navigation links

variations.name: anchor-nav (pipe-separated)
variations.domSignature: H4 or paragraph with pipe-separated anchor links (#section-id)
variations.contentModel: List of anchor links (link text | link text | link text)

blocks.consolidationReason: Unique in-page navigation pattern. Could be a simple EDS block or default content with anchor links.

blocks.description: Social media icon links

variations.name: social-links (brand page)
variations.domSignature: H4 + linked social media icons (Facebook, Twitter, YouTube)
variations.contentModel: Heading text + social platform icon links

blocks.consolidationReason: Simple pattern. Can be default content with icon images.

blocks.description: Horizontal rule section divider

variations.name: separator (standard hr)
variations.contentModel: Simple horizontal rule

blocks.consolidationReason: Maps to standard EDS section break (---). No block needed.

blocks.description: Regulatory disclaimer text

variations.name: disclaimer (research use only)
variations.contentModel: 'For Research Use Only. Not for use in diagnostic procedures.' or similar

blocks.consolidationReason: Simple text. Map to default content or shared EDS fragment.

blocks.description: Statistics/numbers highlight block

variations.name: highlights (stats grid)
variations.contentModel: Grid of statistic numbers with labels (e.g., '120,000+ Colleagues', '$40B+ Revenue')

blocks.consolidationReason: Unique corporate component. Custom block needed.

blocks.description: CEO letter / blockquote block

variations.name: quote (CEO letter)
variations.contentModel: Portrait image + quote text + attribution name/title

blocks.consolidationReason: Standard quote/testimonial pattern. Map to simple EDS block.

blocks.description: Report download section with links to PDF reports

variations.name: report-hub (CSR reports)
variations.contentModel: Report title + year + download link/thumbnail

blocks.consolidationReason: Similar to download-card (B11). Could share same EDS block.

blocks.description: Rotating hero carousel/slider

variations.name: carousel (hero slider)
variations.domSignature: Legacy carousel with rotating content panels containing image + text + CTA
variations.contentModel: Multiple slides: each with image + H2 heading + paragraph + CTA

blocks.consolidationReason: EDS carousel block needed for rotating hero content. Custom JS required.

blocks.description: Raw HTML / third-party embed container

variations.name: embed (raw HTML)
variations.contentModel: Arbitrary HTML content (scripts, iframes, custom widgets)

blocks.consolidationReason: Generic embed container for third-party content.

blocks.description: Grid of related page links with thumbnails

variations.name: related-pages (4-up with images)
variations.domSignature: 4-column grid: each with image thumbnail + CTA text link
variations.contentModel: 4 items: Image + text link to sibling/related page

blocks.consolidationReason: Similar to cards pattern. Can be a 'cards' variant with minimal content (image + link).
